title: YOUTH AND FAMILY MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: POLK COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH MONMOUTH YOUTH AND FAMILY MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides child outpatient services for behavior problems, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focuses on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma related care, and wraparound services (for high needs children). 1310 Main Street E Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (503) 400-3550 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 400-3550 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Community Mental Health Agencies Family Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS HOTLINE AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
